luxR 0.0.0.9000
  • Reference
    • Releases
    • Changelog
    • Changelog

Package index

Data structures

Core S3 object for a light exposure trace.

light_trace()
Construct a light exposure trace object
validate_light_trace()
Validate a light exposure trace

Exposure metrics

Photic exposure summaries.

compute_mean_light()
Compute mean or median light exposure
compute_tat()
Compute Time Above Threshold (TAT) for light exposure
compute_photic_history()
Compute cumulative photic history
compute_melanopic_edi()
Approximate melanopic equivalent daylight illuminance (melanopic EDI)

Timing & regularity metrics

Light onset/offset, timing, and regularity.

find_light_onset()
Find daily light onset
find_light_offset()
Find daily light offset
compute_light_midpoint()
Compute mean light timing (MLiT)
compute_lri()
Compute the Light Regularity Index (LRI)

Visualisation

Actogram-style plotting for visual QC.

plot_light_actogram()
Plot a light exposure actogram

Package

Package-level documentation.

luxR luxR-package
luxR: Light Exposure and Photic Regularity Analysis for Chronobiology Research

On this page

luxR — Circadia Lab, Northumbria University. Lucas França & Mario Leocadio-Miguel.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.1.
